text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, March 29. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. I've got the schedule covered. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the schedule covered. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Yum, that sounds delicious! Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. I can help troubleshoot that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
